'''dhangunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tablestone|tablestone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tablestone|tablestone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhangunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhænginith|dhænginith]] || [[word:dhænginij|dhænginij]] || [[word:dhænginish|dhænginish]] || [[word:dhængini|dhængini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangungunuth|dhangungunuth]] || [[word:dhangungunuj|dhangungunuj]] || [[word:dhangungunush|dhangungunush]] || [[word:dhangungunu|dhangungunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhangunuth|dhangunuth]] || [[word:dhangunuj|dhangunuj]] || [[word:dhangunush|dhangunush]] || [[word:dhangunu|dhangunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangufnuth|dhangufnuth]] || [[word:dhangufnuj|dhangufnuj]] || [[word:dhangufnush|dhangufnush]] || [[word:dhangufnuf|dhangufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhangunuthu|dhangunuthu]] || [[word:dhangunuju|dhangunuju]] || [[word:dhangunushu|dhangunushu]] || [[word:dhangunuku|dhangunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhangunuth|dhangunuth]] || [[word:dhangunuj|dhangunuj]] || [[word:dhangunush|dhangunush]] || [[word:dhangunu|dhangunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhangunuthul|dhangunuthul]] || [[word:dhangunujul|dhangunujul]] || [[word:dhangunushul|dhangunushul]] || [[word:dhangunukul|dhangunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhangunuthuthu|dhangunuthuthu]] || [[word:dhangunujuju|dhangunujuju]] || [[word:dhangunushushu|dhangunushushu]] || [[word:dhangunuku|dhangunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhangunuthun|dhangunuthun]] || [[word:dhangunujun|dhangunujun]] || [[word:dhangunushun|dhangunushun]] || [[word:dhangunukun|dhangunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhangunuthuoro|dhangunuthuoro]] || [[word:dhangunujuoro|dhangunujuoro]] || [[word:dhangunushuoro|dhangunushuoro]] || [[word:dhangunukuoro|dhangunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
